reviews.comment:
Largas colas y por la noche un solo playero,

(Translated by Google)
Long queues and at night only one beachgoer.

reviews.comment:
Buen atencion, muy piolas a la hora de tratar a sus clientes, y fueron mas alla de lo esperado. Muy recomendado.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, very friendly with their customers, and they went above and beyond expectations. Highly recommended.

reviews.comment:
Se podría mejorar el mantenimiento del lugar. En realidad, es el único lugar que ofrece combustible de bandera en la zona ya que no hay muchas alternativas.

(Translated by Google)
The maintenance of this place could be improved. It's actually the only place that offers premium fuel in the area, as there aren't many alternatives.

reviews.comment:
La atención del personal es buena pero tardas 1 hora en cargar. Un solo playero, se pierde mucho tiempo. Recomiendo ir a otro lugar.

(Translated by Google)
The staff is friendly, but it takes an hour to load. Just one beach chair is a waste of time. I recommend going somewhere else.
